refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall monitor energy consumption and tonnage moved, analyze energy efficiency performance, and provide actionable feedback to meet the customer-defined energy efficiency target.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is high-level and needs decomposition into measurable and controllable sub-functions to enable design and verification. Monitoring, analysis, and feedback are key functions to achieve and maintain energy efficiency.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify energy consumption and tonnage data collection accuracy, validate energy efficiency calculations against target, and confirm feedback mechanisms influence operational behavior.
sub_frs: FR1: Monitor energy consumption and tonnage moved
FR2: Analyze energy efficiency performance against target
FR3: Provide actionable feedback to operators and system for efficiency improvement

candidate_dps: DP1: Integrated sensor and data acquisition system for energy and tonnage
DP2: Energy efficiency analytics engine with KPI computation
DP3: Feedback and alert generation system for operator and system adjustments
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1, DP2, DP3 combined to cover monitoring, analysis, and feedback functions

potential_sources: Data flow dependencies between DP1 and DP2
Feedback loop coupling between DP3 and DP1/DP2
coupling_check.notes: Coupling is expected and manageable with clear interface definitions; modular separation supports maintainability.

assumptions_risks: Assumes reliable sensor data and network connectivity
Risk of inaccurate KPI if data is incomplete or delayed
Risk of operator ignoring feedback alerts
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider explicit error handling and fallback modes in DP design to mitigate data quality risks.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system-level integration of energy monitoring, analytics, and feedback functions

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives sensor data on energy consumption and tonnage moved from Vehicle

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Sends feedback and efficiency improvement tasks to Vehicle and Teleoperation modules

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Sends alerts if energy efficiency issues impact safety policies

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports data exchange between NGHE Solution and Teleoperation/Safety Services

module_containment_scores.notes: Primary owner of energy efficiency functions; high containment with low diffusion risk.
Provides raw data but does not perform analysis or feedback; moderate diffusion risk if functions spread here.
Receives feedback but should not contain core analytics; risk of diffusion if feedback logic duplicated.
May receive alerts but not responsible for energy efficiency logic; high diffusion risk if functions spread here.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing energy efficiency monitoring, analysis, and feedback in NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and supports clear ownership.
containment_risks: Potential duplication of feedback logic in Teleoperation module
Data latency or loss over Network Link impacting real-time analysis
Cross-module coordination complexity with Safety Services for alerting
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Define strict interface contracts and ownership boundaries to prevent diffusion; implement monitoring of data integrity over Network Link.

fr_dp_gate.reason: FR decomposition into monitoring, analysis, and feedback is clear and maps well to candidate DPs with manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Feedback logic duplication risk in Teleoperation
Data handling responsibilities between Vehicle and NGHE Solution
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: NGHE Solution module shows strong containment scores; recommended to enforce ownership to mitigate diffusion.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via telemetry data validation, KPI computation checks, and feedback effectiveness tests.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of FRs to NGHE Solution module with defined interfaces to Vehicle, Teleoperation, and Safety Services.

recommended_revisions: Add error handling and fallback modes in DP design
Strengthen interface contracts to prevent logic duplication
Plan verification scenarios for data integrity and feedback impact

decision.justification: Current level of decomposition and assignments meet criteria for clarity, containment, and verification feasibility with manageable risks.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Monitor energy consumption and tonnage moved
FR2: Analyze energy efficiency performance against target
FR3: Provide actionable feedback to operators and system for efficiency improvement

revise.why: Incorporate error handling and fallback mechanisms to address data quality and operational risks.

assumptions: Reliable sensor data and network connectivity
open_risks: Data latency or loss impacting KPI accuracy
Potential feedback logic duplication across modules
evidence_needed: Verification test results of feedback effectiveness
